title: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number
description: Given a string containing digits from 2-9 inclusive, return all possible letter combinations that the number could represent. Print them separated by a space.

sample_test_cases.output: ad ae af bd be bf cd ce cf

hidden_test_cases.output: paj pak pal pbj pbk pbl pcj pck pcl qaj qak qal qbj qbk qbl qcj qck qcl raj rak ral rbj rbk rbl rcj rck rcl saj sak sal sbj sbk sbl scj sck scl
